name: groceries
description: Purchases from supermarkets and grocery stores, related to food or every day essentials

name: restaurants
description: Dine-in or takeout from restaurants, cafes, bakeries, fast food places, etc.

name: utility
description: Payments for utilities such as electricity, internet, phone bills, fees, public transit, health care, pharmacies, dental care, etc.

name: car
description: Payments for car related expenses such as gas, parking, tolls, auto insurance, etc.

name: house
description: Payments for house related expenses such as home maintenance, furniture, home insurance, etc.

name: leisure
description: Transactions related to leisure and travel activities such as hotels, flights, tickets, streaming services, etc. This category is for non-essential purchases but doesn't include eating out.
